outcome_1: A completed, written business plan — answers to the seven questions every business needs to answer
outcome_2: A packaged offer using a proven framework, with a price attached
outcome_3: A customer avatar — the specific person you are selling to and why
form_heading: Get notified about upcoming workshop dates
outcome_4: Your first sales script with objections mapped and responses prepared
outcome_5: A primary marketing channel committed to, with a weekly action target
form_desc: Register below and we will contact you ahead of the next available date with full details and your place confirmation.
who_desc: Corporate professionals — in marketing, finance, law, or any field — who have been carrying a business idea alongside a full-time job and haven't been able to move it forward. You do not need to have everything figured out. You need to show up and do the work on the day.
intro_p1: Most people who want to build a business spend years thinking about it. Watching others. Waiting until they feel ready.
intro_p2: The Business Builder Workshop is built for one thing: getting you off the starting line. In one room, with a structured process, you will produce real outputs — not notes from a talk, not a summary of someone else's framework. Your business plan. Your offer. The beginning of your first sales script.
social_proof_heading: The content works. The room delivers.
hero_desc: A free half-day event for corporate professionals who are ready to stop thinking about starting, and actually start.
main_heading: Five hours. A business plan, an offer, and a 30 day plan — all yours.
social_proof_desc: The Business Builder Workshop has a 5-star rating on Google. Attendees consistently describe the Offer Building session as the standout moment — a room full of people helping each other build better businesses.
